ADDITIONAL PROCEDURES ARE IN PLACE TO REGULATE TRAFFIC FLOW AT ISLE OF MAN AIRPORT DURING THE ISLE OF MAN TT RACES. ALL VISITING AIRCRAFT WILL REQUIRE A HANDLING AGENT AND TO SUBMIT A FULL FLIGHT PLAN. A SLOT REFERENCE NUMBER WILL ALSO BE REQUIRED ON NOMINATED DATES. AIRCRAFT FREECALLING ATC WITHOUT THESE MAY NOT BE PERMITTED TO LAND. AIRCRAFT MAY ALSO BE ASKED TO REMAIN OUTSIDE CONTROLLED AIRSPACE SUBJECT TO CONTROLLER WORKLOAD. BFS038/2026 REFERS
